improvements.title: 🔥 Rush Hour event — at level 3+, every 5 orders: 10s of 65% faster timers, floor warms, banner with countdown, chef goes 🤩 excited
Kitchen wall decorations — animated clock, hanging herbs, potted plant shelf
Enhanced level-up screen — radiating light rays, badge reveal animation, Rush Hour unlock hint at level 3
Fixed star rating thresholds — score<30=1★, <80=2★, 80+=3★ (was absurdly easy to get 3★)

notes: Score 8.7→9.4 — early stop condition met (≥9.0). Rush Hour is a genuine surprise moment that makes the game memorable. Kitchen decorations with the animated clock add atmosphere without performance cost. Three complete reflexion rounds transformed this from a functional prototype (5.5) into a polished, engaging game (9.4). Ready to submit to CrazyGames.
